overall.description: First-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis (Night City from Cyberpunk 2077), featuring towering skyscrapers covered in digital billboards, elevated walkways, and neon-lit streets. The camera moves steadily along sidewalks, crosses a large intersection, and gazes up at building-top steam vents in a dense commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with red bike lane and planters

events.description: approaching the elevated garden overlook with metal railing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated sidewalk, glancing over the railing at the garden plaza below

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the road parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: large yellow billboard with red text and cartoon chef character
curved elevated highway structure with orange lighting
large vertical digital screen displaying a female character
raised planter beds with tropical plants along the walkway edge
tall black street lamp with red accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated pedestrian walkway in a cyberpunk city, with the iconic yellow ALL FOODS billboard visible ahead. The path features red bike lanes and planters with greenery, while an elevated transit ramp curves overhead to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated transit overpass

events.description: passing under the massive concrete overpass structure
slight turn to navigate the covered walkway curve

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass, following a pedestrian in a red jacket

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete support beams and ceiling of the elevated transit line
modern glass building with green 'NIGHT CITY' signage

segments.scene_description: Moving through a covered walkway beneath the elevated transit structure, the lighting shifts to artificial shadows. The NIGHT CITY building becomes visible to the left as the camera passes under massive concrete support beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with yellow grid road markings

events.description: exiting the covered overpass into the open sunlit intersection
green sports car drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with yellow grid markings, navigating between vehicles

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: road surface marked with yellow crisscross grid pattern
tall commercial building with blue 'FOURTH WALL' signage at street level
tall cylindrical structure with vertical pink and blue neon lights

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overpass into a bright sunlit intersection marked with yellow grid patterns. The camera crosses the wide road as a green sports car passes by, with the Fourth Wall building rising ahead and a colorful vertical neon pillar visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial canyon with towering digital billboards

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the towering building facades and sky
steam vents release white smoke from building rooftop

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the towering buildings, steam vents, and flying vehicle overhead

entered.detail: white steam smoke billowing from building ventilation system
multiple stacked digital screens on building facade showing advertisements
small aerial vehicle flying between the skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: Approaching the Fourth Wall building, the camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the skyscrapers covered in digital billboards. Steam vents release white smoke from the rooftops while a flying vehicle passes between the towers against the blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a structured pedestrian walkway through a shaded underpass and into a sprawling, sunlit urban intersection. It begins on an elevated path marked by red bike lanes and greenery, moving toward a prominent yellow All Foods billboard as a transit ramp curves overhead. As the camera passes beneath the massive concrete support beams of the transit structure, the environment shifts into artificial shadows, momentarily framing the Night City building to the left. The scene then opens into a bright, sun-drenched intersection with yellow grid patterns, where the camera crosses the wide road past a speeding green sports car and a colorful neon pillar. Finally, the camera approaches the Fourth Wall building and tilts upward, revealing towering skyscrapers draped in digital billboards and white steam venting into a blue sky as a flying vehicle glides between the peaks.
